plan_adherence_notes: The execution plan was not carried out beyond task artifacts. `git diff --name-status a7b6d6fd..HEAD` shows only this leaf's `questions.json`, `research.json`, and `plan.json`; there are no edits to `backend/server.py` or `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`. The code still serializes `/positions` as the legacy four-field row `{marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice}` in `backend/server.py`, and `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` still lock that same baseline payload. Planned steps for ordered replay helpers, signed average-cost reconstruction, additive `unrealizedPnl`, expanded replay/mark-fallback regressions, and final implementation diff review were therefore not executed.
reason: The branch does not contain the required backend or regression work. The targeted selector `python3 -m pytest -v --tb=short tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketApiUnitTests::test_root_route_returns_service_index tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` passes 15 existing tests, but it is still passing against the old four-field `/positions` contract and the pre-existing exposure baseline. Research and planning were strong and internally consistent, yet execution never advanced into `backend/server.py` or `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, so this leaf cannot be approved.
